CustomField.description: Automatically identifies luxury properties based on criteria
CustomField.formula: OR( Listing_Price__c > 1000000, AND(Property_PricePerSqFt__c > 500, Square_Footage__c > 3000), AND(Pool__c, Square_Footage__c > 4000), AND(Garage_Spaces__c >= 3, Square_Footage__c > 3500) )
CustomField.label: Is_Luxury_Property
